description: Images captured before the white-up convention. These are intentionally excluded from corpus_manifest.json and should be used only for negative-orientation/capture-guidance diagnostics.

pairs.reasonExcludedFromCorpusManifest: Pre-convention capture; not white-up/yellow-up after flip, so no canonical GT is expected for the normal corpus contract.
pairs.intendedUse: Negative-orientation / capture-guidance candidate for testing rejection or user-facing orientation feedback.
